title: Kerala court seeks report from Madhya Pradesh police on Kumbh Mela fame Monalisa's marriage
description: A Kerala court on Monday sought a report from the Madhya Pradesh Police in connection with allegations that Kumbh Mela fame Monalisa was a minor at the time of her marriage to Mohammed Farman Khan [Neyyattinkara P Nagaraj v MV Govindan & ors]. Thiruvananthapuram Additional District and Sessions Judge (POCSO), Shibu MP directed the Station House Officer to obtain details of the investigation being conducted in Madhya Pradesh and to place a report before the court by May 20.The Court was consi
